text_block_list.text:
I've taken Taiki Shuttle to a hot spring resort as a
reward for her accomplishments, using the ticket
we won in a raffle. I drop by her room to see how
she's doing...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaw! It's the smell of real tatami!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This right here is bona fide Japanese culture!
Woohoo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Traineeer! My room is amazing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, take a gander at this! This wooden box has
snacks and a teapot in it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wow! You can even see a river from the window!
Is that steam from the open-air bath?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I've been waitin' for this moment ever since
we won that raffle!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
My eyes were glued to the website all day
yesterday! I couldn't help myself!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
They've got full-course meals, tatami rooms,
free-flowin' hot springs...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It all looks like a heap of fun! I'm so happy right
now!

Once her excitement has ebbed, the two of us
head to the hot spring for a dip.
Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whew! That was a mighty fine bath!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
The water was white as can be. I could really feel
it workin' its magic on me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm all toasty now—maybe a little too toasty! Phew... Boy, am I hot!
choice_data_list: Want to take a stroll before we eat?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that way we can cool down in the evening
breeze! Good thinkin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Going for a walk after a dip in the hot spring
seems downright gentle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, right! Genteel—that's it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I've had nothing but fun since the moment
we arrived! I'm feelin' all warm and fuzzy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I think I get why we waited so long to take
this trip!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'd never be this amped up after losing a race—or
before startin' one either!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This is a reward for all my hard work, ain't it? I'm
glad I did my very best to win!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Only 'cause you made this hot spring trip the best
one ever, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're always doin' things to put a smile on my
face.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You pulled out all the stops during training so I
could go on and win plenty of races...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I can always count on ya when I'm feelin'
lonely.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe... So that's how ya feel.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much for stickin' by me this whole time,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause ya were always there for me that I was
able to keep my eye on the prize.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I'm done makin' everything about my own
happiness!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Next time's gonna be a reward for both of us!
Let's work hard so we can travel again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Know why? 'Cause we're—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Right, hehe!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's grab ourselves a bite to eat! My
tummy's rumblin'!

We indulge in a host of wonderful food and enjoy
the rest of our trip.

I sense that Taiki Shuttle and I have formed an
irreplaceable bond during this time together.
